_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/beautiful-chat — Search Flights pill. A2UI fixed-schema. Two-stage matcher (false→true). Payload byte-equal to feature-parity's call_fp_search_flights_001 so FlightCard literal fingerprints match across both runners.
